sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented in sources

special_mechanics.name: Run Ability
special_mechanics.description: All playable characters can run in Streets of Rage 3, whereas only Skate could run in previous entries. This represents a universal movement upgrade.

special_mechanics.name: Vertical Dodge Roll
special_mechanics.description: All characters can perform a vertical dodge roll as a movement/evasion mechanic.

special_mechanics.name: Blitz Attacks
special_mechanics.description: Attack moves that can be upgraded through successive play. Certain weapons have special attacks performed like Blitz attacks.

special_mechanics.name: Special Attack Meter
special_mechanics.description: Rechargeable meter allowing players to perform a Special attack without losing health when full.

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Empirical/Qualitative data. Sources document gameplay mechanics and character abilities but contain no specific physics parameters, velocity values, acceleration constants, or sub-pixel calculations. Movement information is limited to qualitative descriptions (all characters can now run, dodge roll added, gameplay is faster than SoR2).
sources_used: wikipedia - Streets of Rage 3 Gameplay section
